components.description: Safe-area aware screen container with optional header/footer slots and status bar styling.
accessibility_notes: Use accessibilityRole='summary' on header container when header is present
Ensure content container has importantForAccessibility='yes' and respects prefers-reduced-motion
components.implementation_notes: Wrap in SafeAreaView; when scroll=true, render ScrollView with keyboardShouldPersistTaps='handled'.

components.description: Top header with date display and optional consistency ring.
accessibility_notes: Header container role='header' (accessibilityRole='header')
Ring is a button with accessibilityRole='button' and accessibilityLabel including percentage
components.implementation_notes: Compose with ConsistencyRing; use Pressable for onRingPress; announce updates via AccessibilityInfo.announceForAccessibility.
usage_examples: <AppHeader dateDisplay='Friday, August 15' showConsistencyRing ringPercentage={80} ringLabel='4 of 5 habits this week' onRingPress={navToSunday} />

components.description: Circular progress ring with optional center label.
accessibility_notes: Set accessibilityRole='image' with accessibilityLabel `${percentage}% consistency`
components.implementation_notes: Use react-native-svg Circle with strokeDashoffset; respects reduced motion by disabling ringPulse animation.
usage_examples: <ConsistencyRing percentage={72} size={96} strokeWidth={8} color='#0E6B4A' backgroundColor='rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' label='4/5' />

components.description: Card representing a habit with title, start button, context hint, and progress state.
accessibility_notes: Entire card is Pressable with accessibilityRole='button' and label `${title}, ${todayProgress} today`
Start button child has accessibilityHint 'Starts a session'
components.implementation_notes: Use StartButton inside; reflect state via tokens colors; include token bucket badge position top-right.
usage_examples: <HabitCard habitId='h1' title='Morning Pages' state='ready' todayProgress='none' contextHint='Best time: mornings' onStart={start} onOpen={openDetails} />

components.description: Large circular start button that animates press and progress when running.
accessibility_notes: accessibilityRole='button'
When state changes to 'completed', announce 'Session completed'
components.implementation_notes: Animate scale on press (button_press); show checkmark when completed.

components.description: Bottom action bar with queue, add habit, and settings icons.
accessibility_notes: Each icon is a button with accessible labels: 'Open queue', 'Add habit', 'Open settings'
components.implementation_notes: Use HStack with spacing tokens; apply elevation/shadow tokens.

components.description: Circular timer showing elapsed/remaining time and phase color.
accessibility_notes: Announce 'Floor complete' when progress reaches 1.0 during floor phase
components.implementation_notes: Use react-native-reanimated for smooth progress; color map via semantic tokens.

components.description: Large numeric time remaining label with tabular figures.
accessibility_notes: Use accessibilityLiveRegion='polite' with updates throttled to once per 5s to reduce verbosity
components.implementation_notes: Use text-numeric token class; format mm:ss.

components.description: Primary button prompting to continue to target after floor.
accessibility_notes: accessibilityRole='button' with hint 'Continues timer to target'
components.implementation_notes: Fade/slide in using micro-interaction fade_slide; haptic on press.

components.description: Destructive action requiring long-press to cancel session.
accessibility_notes: Describe hold duration in accessibilityHint; provide alternative double-confirm dialog for switch users
components.implementation_notes: Use Pressable with onLongPress and delayLongPress=holdMillis; show radial progress affordance.

components.description: Token bucket indicator with count and glow on increment.
accessibility_notes: Label as `${count} of ${capacity} tokens`
components.implementation_notes: Play token_award animation on increment; bounce/glow specs included.

components.description: Avatar selection grid with 12 options.

props.avatars: Array<{ id: string; uri: string; alt: string }>

accessibility_notes: Each avatar is a button with label from alt text; reflect selected via accessibilityState={{ selected: true }}
components.implementation_notes: 3-column grid; ensure 44pt min targets; support focus outline.

components.description: Preset selector for Floor/Target/Stretch with quick edit.

props.onChange: (next: { floorSeconds: number; targetSeconds: number; stretchSeconds: number }) => void

accessibility_notes: Group has role='radiogroup' with options descriptive; provide numeric input alternative for screen readers
components.implementation_notes: Show three options with edit icons; long-press shows explanation tooltip.

components.description: Dual-handle slider for quiet hours with default 22:00-07:00.
accessibility_notes: Ensure handles are reachable with screen reader; provide text inputs fallback
components.implementation_notes: Snap to 15-minute increments; enforce start != end; reflect sleep protection policy copy.

components.description: Shows tile lighting up animation after sample completion.
accessibility_notes: Mark as decorative when playing (accessibleElementsHidden) and provide caption text outside
components.implementation_notes: Use Lottie or Reanimated; keep 10s loop with reduced motion fallback static frame.

components.description: CTA to start first 60s floor session.
accessibility_notes: Primary role button; announce 'Starts trial session'
components.implementation_notes: Use accent color; add countdown tooltip if needed.

components.description: Generic settings list with switches and navigations.

props.items: Array<{ key: string; title: string; subtitle?: string; type: 'switch' | 'link'; value?: boolean; onPress?: () => void; onValueChange?: (v: boolean) => void } >

accessibility_notes: Each row has role appropriate to type; provide value text for switches
components.implementation_notes: Use SectionList; apply large hit targets.
usage_examples: <SettingsList items={[{ key: 'privacy', title: 'Privacy', type: 'link', onPress: openPrivacy }]} />

components.description: Modal dialog for explicit consent with two-button choice.
accessibility_notes: Modal uses accessibilityViewIsModal and focuses first heading; trap focus until action
components.implementation_notes: Sheet style modal with two actions; do not proceed without choice.
usage_examples: <PrivacyConsentDialog visible title='Photo Proof' message='Processed locally, only a hash stored for 24h.' permissions={['camera']} retention='24 hours' onAllow={allow} onDeny={deny} />

components.description: Displays unlocks triggered after token awards.

props.unlocks: Array<{ type: 'cosmetic' | 'story' | 'soundtrack'; assetId: string; name?: string; description?: string }>

accessibility_notes: Announce list length and each item; provide close button with label 'Close unlocks'
components.implementation_notes: Trigger after token_award animation completion; animate sheet_open.
usage_examples: <UnlockModal visible unlocks={[{ type: 'cosmetic', assetId: 'lantern_blue', name: 'Lantern Blue' }]} onClose={close} />

components.description: Transient message banner for success/warning/info.
accessibility_notes: Use accessibilityLiveRegion='polite'; keep durations accessible (>= 3s) or user dismissible
components.implementation_notes: Slide/fade in from top; color by semantic tokens.

components.description: Context-aware gentle reminder banner.
accessibility_notes: Provide buttons 'Start' and 'Dismiss'; respect quiet hours by not rendering or aria-hidden
components.implementation_notes: Slide in bottom within sweet heat window; auto-dismiss with inactivity.
usage_examples: <NudgeBanner visible message='Your Reading lantern is ready to light 🏮' onStart={startHabit} onDismiss={dismiss} />

components.description: Button that opens external resource via deep link manager.
accessibility_notes: Announce domain/app name; open in appropriate app; confirm failure with toast
components.implementation_notes: Use Linking.canOpenURL then openURL; log hashed URL on failure.

components.description: Empty state with icon, title, and action.
accessibility_notes: Role='summary'; ensure action is focusable with role=button
components.implementation_notes: Used when no habits configured or no past sessions.
usage_examples: <ListEmptyState title='No habits yet' actionLabel='Add a habit' onAction={addHabit} />

components.description: Indeterminate spinner with reduced motion fallback.
accessibility_notes: Provide accessibilityLabel when label is null, e.g., 'Loading'
components.implementation_notes: Use ActivityIndicator; stop animation if reduced motion is enabled and show progress text.

components.description: Bottom sheet primitive used for modals like Unlocks and Privacy.
accessibility_notes: Treat as modal; focus trap; swipe to close has button alternative
components.implementation_notes: Use react-native-gesture-handler + reanimated; animate per sheet_open spec.

components.description: Pill indicator for 'none' | 'floor' | 'target' | 'stretch' progress.
accessibility_notes: Announce semantic status, e.g., 'Floor met today'
components.implementation_notes: Background and text color from semantic tokens.

components.description: Utility component to announce messages via screen reader.
accessibility_notes: Uses AccessibilityInfo.announceForAccessibility; do not overuse
components.implementation_notes: Render null; side-effect announce on prop change.
